creator: daniel@blodan.se
text:
There is a larger change waiting to be commited so that the APCu module works just as all the other pecl ports

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D9333

devel/pecl-APCu will be the 7+ port
devel/pecl-APCu4 will be the old 5.6 port

You will have to wait until this gets commited and then compile devel/pecl-APCu which will work with 7.0 and 7.1
